violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside prep coolers and shelving in walk in cooler.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in kitchen have tears in floor tiles.

Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Kevin is in process of renewal. Will need to be renewed within 90 days of expiration (11/17/25).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Shelving in walk in cooler need cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Fan covers in walk in cooler need cleaned.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Finally reached 160F after 3rd attempt.--Wash water for mechanical warewash machine was not maintained at proper temperature. -Did not meet minimum temp. of 150F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor covering has tear that needs repaired.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
